# Liminal

> Model-agnostic creative coding studio and agentic art workbench.

Liminal turns natural-language prompts into creative-code artifacts across p5.js, GLSL, Three.js, SVG, Hydra, Strudel, Tone.js, Revideo, ASCII, kinetic text, and other creative domains. It includes a chat-first Studio, CLI, TUI, multi-agent critique, taste learning, compost/dreaming systems, and self-improvement workflows.

## Use cases
- AI-assisted creative coding
- Generative art and shader iteration
- Music and live-coding experiments
- Model comparison for creative tasks
- Creative-code evaluation and critique
- Local-first artist workbench with provider flexibility

## Key paths
- `README.md`: public overview and quick start
- `docs/`: launch, proof, architecture, and model-assimilation docs
- `gui/`: Studio interface
- `src/`: creative generation and orchestration code

## Keywords
AI creative coding studio, generative art agent, LLM art workbench, creative coding CLI, p5.js AI generator, GLSL shader agent, Three.js generation, AI music coding, model-agnostic creative system.
